reason: Primary requirements, scope, acceptance criteria, and implementation plan for the close-decision/next-day execution architecture refactor.
Research on current scanner data flow, date/status semantics, mixed boundaries, and recommended architecture options.
This refactor changes data flow across CLI, scanner, routing, rendering, JSON artifacts, and tests.
Implementation should reuse existing signal/routing/execution-check concepts where appropriate while avoiding duplicated plan/confirmation serialization logic.
